description.value: You steal the targetâs face, transforming yourself into a flawless imitation of it. All of the targetâs facial features, vocal cues, and identifying physical traits change, transforming it into an unremarkable member of its race and gender. You transform into a perfect likeness of the targetâs true form, as if affected by alter self, and gain a +10 bonus on Disguise checks to impersonate the original subject of this spell; you take no penalties on this check if the original target is of a different race, age, size, or gender. Claim identity prevents any other polymorph effects from restoring the targetâs true face for the spellâs duration, though the target can still assume other forms or faces via magic or any natural shapechanging ability. Claim Identity, Greater This spell functions as claim identity, except it transforms its target into a helpless, inanimate porcelain mask for the spellâs duration. The target remains aware of everything it can see or hear while transformed. The target canât speak or move, but can still take purely mental actions (such as casting certain spells) or be targeted by spells that affect its mind. Any creature donning this mask is transformed into a flawless imitation of the spellâs target, as if affected by claim identity, and reverts to its natural form upon removing the mask.
